text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 43 

PRIOR_AUTHORIZATION_YN 

LABEL: Prior Authorization Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This is a CCW-derived field that indicates whether the prescription was subject to prior authorization, 
according to the benefit structure and formulary for the beneficiary’s plan. 

Starting in 2010, this variable included in the formulary file (rather than the PDE file).
